mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_name = #{username} AND user_type = 'NORMAL' AND user_status != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND user_type = 'NORMAL' AND user_status != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = 'NORMAL' AND user_status != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_type = 'NORMAL' AND user_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password_hash, user_name, phone, profile_image_url, birth_date, address, detail_address, emergency_contact, user_type, user_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{birthDate}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{emergencyContact}, 'NORMAL', 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_name = #{userName}, phone = #{phone}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, address = #{address}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = 'NORMAL'
UPDATE users SET user_status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = 'NORMAL'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND user_type = 'NORMAL'
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE user_name = #{username} AND user_type = 'NORMAL'
